message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Sozialindikatoren in der DDR 1985","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8005","justification":"Contains social indicators for the GDR around 1985, including employment, housing conditions, and aspects of community life relevant to leisure and living conditions in the 1980s."},{"title":"Sozialindikatoren in der DDR 1987","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8006","justification":"Follow-up social indicator study for the GDR in 1987. Covers employment structure, housing, and living standards, with indicators touching community life and leisure in the late 1980s."},{"title":"Sozialindikatoren in der DDR 1989","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8007","justification":"Late-1980s social indicators dataset for the GDR, including employment situation, housing quality, and broader living conditions, which connect to community and leisure aspects before reunification."},{"title":"Sozialberichterstattung DDR 1980","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8060","justification":"Social reporting dataset for the GDR around 1980, containing indicators on employment, housing, and living conditions; relevant to community and everyday life at the start of the 1980s."},{"title":"Lebensbedingungen in der DDR 1981","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8061","justification":"Study on living conditions in the GDR, including employment situation, housing conditions, and aspects of community life and leisure patterns in the early 1980s."},{"title":"Lebensbedingungen in der DDR 1984","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8062","justification":"Mid-1980s GDR living conditions dataset. Includes information on employment, housing, local community infrastructure and services, and possibilities for leisure activities."},{"title":"Lebensbedingungen in der DDR 1987","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8063","justification":"Late-1980s follow-up on living conditions in the GDR, covering employment, housing situation, urban-rural differences, and use of leisure facilities."},{"title":"Wohnen und Wohnzufriedenheit in der DDR 1984","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8070","justification":"Focused dataset on housing and dwelling satisfaction in the GDR mid-1980s, directly addressing housing conditions and their relation to community and urban-rural environments."},{"title":"Freizeit und Kultur in der DDR 1983","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8080","justification":"Dataset on leisure and cultural activities in the GDR, covering participation in sports, tourism, and cultural events, as well as local community facilities in the 1980s."},{"title":"Arbeits- und Lebensbedingungen in der DDR 1988","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8090","justification":"Study on work and living conditions in the GDR near the end of the 1980s, explicitly addressing employment, workplace, housing, and aspects of community and leisure life."}]}
